converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Lloyd R. Simons Director of Extension papers
Simons, L. R.
21-24-108
7.5 cubic feet. 7.5 cubic feet.
1932-1935, 1962. Correspondence, photographs, publications Correspondence, scrapbooks, photoprints, publications, and other records of the Director of Extension of the New York State College of Agriculture at Cornell University. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 16 - folder 1 ======= 16 - folder 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2267906
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
May 2015
EAD encoding:
May 2015
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2015
Cite As:
Lloyd R. Simons Director of Extension papers, #21-24-108. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Correspondence, scrapbooks, photoprints, publications, and other records of the Director of Extension of the New York State College of Agriculture at Cornell University.
Scope and content
Typed manuscript of "The Extension Service Partnership with County Supporting Agencies," by Lloyd R. Simons (carbon copy), 113 pp.
University extension -- New York (State) Agricultural extension work -- New York (State) New York State College of Agriculture
